children.name: Heading
children.characters: Built on solid ground and reputation

children.name: Text
children.characters: TK's Trucking & Excavation serves clients across Newfoundland to Ontario with reliable transportation and excavation services. We move what matters and build what's needed.

children.name: Heading
children.characters: Built on trust and hard work

children.name: Text
children.characters: TK's Trucking is a family-run operation that understands what it takes to move freight right. We've earned our reputation through dependable service and professional drivers who know the road.

children.name: Heading
children.characters: Hauling solutions built for your needs

children.name: Text
children.characters: We handle a wide range of freight across Canada. From standard loads to specialized hauling, we have the capacity and expertise to move what matters.

Text
children.characters: We deliver on our commitments. Every load, every route, every time.

children.name: Text
children.characters: We deliver dependable trucking and excavation services with a focus on safety, efficiency, and getting the job done right.

children.name: Text
children.characters: We deliver dependable trucking and excavation services with a focus on safety, efficiency, and getting the job done right.

children.name: Text
children.characters: We deliver dependable trucking and excavation services with a focus on safety, efficiency, and getting the job done right.

children.name: Text
children.characters: Based in Newfoundland, we move freight across all the eastern provinces as far as Ontario. Our network and experience mean your load gets where it needs to go, no matter the distance.

children.name: Text
children.characters: TK's Trucking is a family operation rooted in reliability and respect. We move freight the way we'd want ours moved—with care, professionalism, and a commitment to getting it right.

children.name: Text
children.characters: Get a quote or discuss your transportation needs with our team.
